testcase.name: Tentativas de transferência com diferentes entradas -- @1.1

error.message: Message: Cannot locate option with value: 12345; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

testcase.error: Failing step: When eu informo a conta origem "12345", conta destino "54321" e valor "100.00" ... error in 10.256s Location: features/transfer.feature:6 Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\model.py", line 1991, in run match.run(runner.context) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\matchers.py", line 105, in run self.func(context, *args, **kwargs) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "features\steps\common_steps.py", line 114, in step_fill_transfer context.transfer_page.fill_transfer(from_account, to_account, amount) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\features\pages\transfer_page.py", line 35, in fill_transfer Select(self.driver.find_element(*TransferLocators.FROM_ACCOUNT_INPUT)).select_by_value(str(from_account)) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\support\select.py", line 85, in select_by_value raise NoSuchElementException(f"Cannot locate option with value: {value}") selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: 12345; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

testcase.name: Tentativas de transferência com diferentes entradas -- @1.2

error.message: Message: Cannot locate option with value: 12345; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

testcase.name: Tentativas de transferência com diferentes entradas -- @1.3

error.message: Message: Cannot locate option with value: 12345; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

testcase.error: Failing step: When eu informo a conta origem "12345", conta destino "54321" e valor "0" ... error in 10.323s Location: features/transfer.feature:6 Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\model.py", line 1991, in run match.run(runner.context) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\matchers.py", line 105, in run self.func(context, *args, **kwargs) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "features\steps\common_steps.py", line 114, in step_fill_transfer context.transfer_page.fill_transfer(from_account, to_account, amount) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\features\pages\transfer_page.py", line 35, in fill_transfer Select(self.driver.find_element(*TransferLocators.FROM_ACCOUNT_INPUT)).select_by_value(str(from_account)) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\support\select.py", line 85, in select_by_value raise NoSuchElementException(f"Cannot locate option with value: {value}") selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: 12345; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

testcase.name: Tentativas de transferência com diferentes entradas -- @1.4

error.message: Message: Cannot locate option with value: 12345; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

testcase.error: Failing step: When eu informo a conta origem "12345", conta destino "54321" e valor "-10" ... error in 11.352s Location: features/transfer.feature:6 Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\model.py", line 1991, in run match.run(runner.context) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\matchers.py", line 105, in run self.func(context, *args, **kwargs) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "features\steps\common_steps.py", line 114, in step_fill_transfer context.transfer_page.fill_transfer(from_account, to_account, amount) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\features\pages\transfer_page.py", line 35, in fill_transfer Select(self.driver.find_element(*TransferLocators.FROM_ACCOUNT_INPUT)).select_by_value(str(from_account)) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\support\select.py", line 85, in select_by_value raise NoSuchElementException(f"Cannot locate option with value: {value}") selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: 12345; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

testcase.name: Tentativas de transferência com diferentes entradas -- @1.6

error.message: Message: Cannot locate option with value: 99999; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

testcase.error: Failing step: When eu informo a conta origem "99999", conta destino "54321" e valor "10" ... error in 10.283s Location: features/transfer.feature:6 Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\model.py", line 1991, in run match.run(runner.context) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\behave\matchers.py", line 105, in run self.func(context, *args, **kwargs) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "features\steps\common_steps.py", line 114, in step_fill_transfer context.transfer_page.fill_transfer(from_account, to_account, amount) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\features\pages\transfer_page.py", line 35, in fill_transfer Select(self.driver.find_element(*TransferLocators.FROM_ACCOUNT_INPUT)).select_by_value(str(from_account)) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\aemsb\OneDrive\Área de Trabalho\parabank-tests\venv\Lib\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\support\select.py", line 85, in select_by_value raise NoSuchElementException(f"Cannot locate option with value: {value}") selenium.common.exceptions.NoSuchElementException: Message: Cannot locate option with value: 99999; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception
